name: Reflex Plus Alutray Pate With Lamb For Cats 85g
description: Alu-tray is a nutritious wet food with high-quality animal protein and a variety of vitamins. It offers multisystemic benefits due to its functional components. With its high-water content, it supports the body's daily water intake and contributes to kidney health. Additionally, it is easy to digest and highly palatable. Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives (4% Lamb), Minerals. Nutrient Components Crude protein 9% Fat content 5% Crude fibre 0.5% Crude ash 2.5% Moisture 83% Nutritional Supplements Functional Components: Taurine (3a370) Vitamins: Vitamin D3 (3a671) 75 IU, Vitamin E (3a700) 30 mg. Trace Elements: 3b605 (Zinc 15 mg), 3b503 (Manganese 6 mg), 3b405 (Copper 1 mg), 3b202 (Iodine 0.5 mg).
